dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses 'momentum' which is not in the allowed indicator list. Substituted RSI_14 as a widely-used momentum oscillator. Entry conditions: RSI < 30 for long (low momentum), RSI > 70 for short (high momentum). Exit conditions: RSI crosses back toward neutral (50) representing 'near zero momentum'. This is a reasonable interpretation of mean-reversion on momentum extremes returning to neutral.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses 'momentum' which is not in the allowed indicator list. Substituted RSI_14 as a widely-used momentum oscillator. Entry conditions: RSI < 30 for long (low momentum), RSI > 70 for short (high momentum). Exit conditions: RSI crosses back toward neutral (50) representing 'near zero momentum'. This is a reasonable interpretation of mean-reversion on momentum extremes returning to neutral.

source_rule_text: Exit a mean-reversion position (short from momentum high or long from momentum low) when momentum returns to near zero.
